pages.title: AFML
pages.text: Group Leader: Prof. Yong Li Deputy Director, Institute of Acoustics, Tongji University Deputy Director, Civil Aviation Key Laboratory of Intelligent Assisted Airworthiness for Aircraft Structures Research Interests: Physical Acoustics, Acoustic Metamaterials, Noise and Vibration Control, Intelligent Acoustic Field Manipulation Prof. Li's research focuses on acoustic functional materials for sound-field control in complex environments, spanning fundamental wave physics, acoustic metamaterials, and noise-control applications. He has published more than 110 papers as first or corresponding author, including co-first and co-corresponding roles, in leading journals such as Physical Review Letters, National Science Review, Science Advances, Nature Communications, Nature Reviews Materials, Nature Reviews Physics, Reports on Progress in Physics, and Science Bulletin; 14 of these papers are ESI Highly Cited Papers. His work has been selected as Editors' Suggestions and featured by APS, AIP, Phys.org, Physics Buzz, Science Daily, and other media outlets. His publications have received more than 14,500 citations, with an H-index of 54. He has been recognized on Highly Cited Researchers lists and the world's top 2% scientists list for career-long impact. His honors include the First Prize of the Ministry of Education Natural Science Award and the Wei Mo’an Acoustics Award from the Shanghai Acoustical Society. His students have won a National Gold Medal in the China International College Students Innovation Competition. Patents on acoustic metamaterial absorbers have been transferred and deployed in large-scale compressor noise-reduction systems, supporting low-noise operation of major equipment. 🧠 Research Interests1. Acoustic Functional Materials for Exotic Wave-Field ControlWe study how artificial structures and functional materials shape acoustic fields in complex media, with an emphasis on wave propagation, interference, localization, wavefront shaping, resonant coupling, and nonreciprocal transport. This direction aims to clarify sound-matter interactions and establish design principles for precise acoustic energy control and advanced acoustic devices. 2. Applications of Acoustic Functional MaterialsWe develop acoustic functional materials for noise control and acoustic performance optimization in major engineering systems. This direction focuses on high-performance sound-absorbing metamaterials and multifunctional composites based on deep-subwavelength structures, with particular attention to resonance, coupling, interference, and dissipation. The goal is to enable broadband, efficient, lightweight, and programmable solutions for sound absorption and insulation in transportation, aerospace, and precision acoustic engineering. 3. Non-Hermitian and Topological AcousticsWe explore the intersection of non-Hermitian physics and topological acoustics, focusing on acoustic implementations of gain/loss modulation, exceptional points (EPs), and topological edge states. This direction investigates nonreciprocal sound propagation, asymmetric mode coupling, and robust energy transport, with the broader aim of advancing acoustic communication, reconfigurable wave control, and intelligent acoustic systems. 📢 Highlights 2026 📝 In June, Dr. Chao Song published a Letter on robust Fabry–Perot bound states in the continuum in Physical Review B 🪪 In April, Dr. Nengyin Wang was named a Shanghai Outstanding Graduate 📝 In February, Hua Ding and Nengyin Wang published a paper on acoustic metamaterial liners in Physical Review Applied 📝 In February, Kaijing Liu and Yihuan Zhu published a paper on AI-driven acoustic metamaterials in Chinese Physics Letters 📝 In January, Yu Xiao published a paper on scattering singularities in acoustic metasurfaces in Science China: Physics, Mechanics & Astronomy 📝 In January, Yujie Cheng and Hua Ding published a paper on lightweight acoustic metaliners in Journal of Materials Chemistry A 🪪 In January, Prof. Yong Li was named to the 2025 Elsevier “Highly Cited Chinese Researchers” list 2025 🪪 In December, Chuanhao Ge received a 2025 Tongji University Outstanding MSc Thesis Award 🔬 In December, Quansen Wang was selected for the CAST Young Scientists Development Program (PhD Track) 🔬 In December, Yihuan Zhu was selected for the CAST Young Scientists Development Program (PhD Track) 🔬 In December, Dr. Ruizhi Dong was selected for the Shanghai “Super Postdoctoral” Incentive Program 🪪 In November, Nengyin Wang received the Tongji University Outstanding Student Award 🪪 In November, Nengyin Wang received the Bronze Convergence Award at the 5th “HaiJu YingCai” Global Innovation & Entrepreneurship Competition 🪪 In November, Yihuan Zhu received the Tongji University Outstanding PhD Student Scholarship 🪪 In November, Prof. Yong Li joined the Editorial Advisory Board of APS Open Science 🪪 In November, Dr. Sibo Huang was named to a National Young Talent Program 🔬 In November, Dr. Zhiling Zhou received the Hong Kong RGC Junior Research Fellow Award 💼 In October, Dr. Sibo Huang was appointed Associate Professor at Shanghai Jiao Tong University 🪪 In October, Nengyin Wang received the National PhD Scholarship 🪪 In October, Quansen Wang received the National PhD Scholarship 🪪 In October, Chun Liu received the National MSc Scholarship 📝 In September, Dr. Jingyi Chen and Dr. Zhiling Zhou published a paper on hybrid degeneracy points in Physical Review Letters 🪪 In September, Prof. Yong Li was listed among the World’s Top 2% Scientists (Career Impact) 📝 In August, Quansen Wang and Chun Liu published a paper on asymmetric acoustic information transport in Nature Communications 🪪 In June, Chun Liu received the ORION MSc Scholarship from Université de Lorraine, France 📝 In June, Chuanhao Ge and Nengyin Wang published a paper on acoustic absorber limits in Physical Review Letters 📝 In May, Nengyin Wang, Dr. Zhiling Zhou, and Dr. Sibo Huang published a paper on ultra-broadband metamaterial absorbers in National Science Review 📝 In May, Ruizhi Dong and Yihuan Zhu published a paper on topological bound states in the continuum in Physical Review Letters 🪪 In May, Nengyin Wang received a Tongji University “Pursuit of Excellence” Student Award nomination More news →

pages.title: 声学功能材料实验室
pages.text: 课题组负责人：李勇教授 同济大学声学研究所副所长 民航航空器结构智能辅助适航重点实验室副主任 研究方向： 物理声学、声学超构材料、噪声振动控制、智能声场调控 围绕复杂环境中声场调控的科学难题，长期从事声学人工结构的理论与应用研究。以第一或通讯作者（含共同）在 Physical Review Letters、National Science Review、Science Advances、Nature Communications、Nature Reviews Materials、Nature Reviews Physics、Reports on Progress in Physics、Science Bulletin 等期刊发表论文 110 余篇（其中14篇 ESI 高被引论文）。研究成果多次入选编辑推荐文章，并被 APS、AIP、Phys.org、Physics Buzz、Science Daily 等媒体专题报道。论文累计被引用超过14,500次，H 因子54，多次入选全球高被引学者及全球前2%顶尖科学家（生涯影响力）。曾获教育部自然科学奖一等奖、上海市声学学会“魏墨盦声学奖”，指导学生获中国国际大学生创新大赛全国金奖。超构吸声体相关专利已实现成果转化，应用大型压气机降噪系统，实现低噪声运行目标。 🧠 研究方向1. 功能材料奇异声场调控 围绕人工结构与功能材料中的声场调控机制展开基础研究，探讨声波在复杂介质中的传播、干涉及局域化规律。研究聚焦于共振耦合、波前整形与非互易声传输等异常波动特性，力求阐明声场与材料相互作用的物理本质，为高精度声能操控与新型声学器件提供理论依据与设计思路。 2. 声学功能材料应用探索 面向装备的噪声控制与声学性能优化需求，开展声学功能材料的应用基础研究。重点推进基于深亚波长结构的高性能吸声超构材料与多功能复合体系设计，系统分析共振、耦合、干涉及耗散机制下的声学能量管理规律。研究目标在于实现宽频、高效、轻量化与可编程的吸隔声方案，支撑交通、航空航天与精密声学工程等领域的技术创新。 3. 非厄米声学及拓扑声学 聚焦非厄米物理与拓扑声学的交叉前沿，系统研究增益/损耗调控、奇异点（EP）及拓扑边缘态的声学实现与动力学特征。重点揭示非互易声传播、模态耦合非对称性及能量传输鲁棒性等新型物理规律。通过构建非厄米拓扑结构与非互易声波通道，推动高鲁棒声通信、可重构声场操控与智能声学系统的发展。 📢 大事件 2026年 📝 6月 宋潮博士关于高鲁棒法布里-珀罗连续域束缚态的论文发表于Physical Review B as Letter 🪪 4月 王能银博士获上海市优秀毕业生称号 📝 2月 丁华和王能银关于切向流下宽带超构声衬的研究成果发表于Physical Review Applied 📝 2月 刘开静和朱一寰关于AI驱动声学超构材料的论文发表于Chinese Physics Letters 📝 1月 肖钰关于声学超表面散射奇异点的论文发表于Science China: Physics, Mechanics and Astronomy - 文章简介 📝 1月 程榆傑和丁华关于轻质宽带超构声衬的论文发表于Journal of Materials Chemistry A 🪪 1月 李勇教授入选2025爱思唯尔“中国高被引学者”榜单 2025年 🪪 12月 葛传昊的学位论文入选同济大学2025年优秀硕士学位论文 🔬 12月 王泉森入选中国科协青年科技人才培育工程博士生专项计划 🔬 12月 朱一寰入选中国科协青年科技人才培育工程博士生专项计划 🔬 12月 董睿智博士入选上海市“超级博士后” 🪪 11月 黄思博博士入选国家级青年人才项目 🪪 11月 王能银获同济大学优秀学生标兵 🪪 11月 王能银获第五届“海聚英才”全球创新创业大赛铜聚奖 🪪 11月 朱一寰获同济大学优秀博士生奖学金 🪪 11月 李勇教授加入APS Open Science期刊Editorial Advisory Board 🔬 11月 周志凌博士获中国香港政府 RGC Junior Research Fellow Award 💼 10月 黄思博博士获聘上海交通大学副教授 🪪 10月 王能银获博士生国家奖学金 🪪 10月 王泉森获博士生国家奖学金 🪪 10月 刘春获硕士生国家奖学金 📝 09月 陈静怡和周志凌博士关于混合简并点的论文发表于物理评论快报 🪪 09月 李勇教授入选全球前2%顶尖科学家（生涯影响力） 📝 08月 王泉森和刘春关于非对称声信息传输的论文发表于自然·通讯 🪪 06月 刘春获法国洛林大学ORION硕士奖学金 📝 06月 葛传昊和王能银关于吸声结构因果律的研究成果发表于物理评论快报 📝 05月 王能银和周志凌/黄思博博士关于超宽频超构吸声体的研究成果发表于国家科学评论 📝 05月 董睿智和朱一寰关于连续谱中拓扑束缚态的研究成果发表于物理评论快报 🪪 05月 王能银获同济大学追求卓越学生提名奖 查看更多新闻 →

pages.title: 📢 Highlights
pages.text: 2026 📝 In June, Dr. Chao Song published a Letter on robust Fabry–Perot bound states in the continuum in Physical Review B 🪪 In April, Dr. Nengyin Wang was named a Shanghai Outstanding Graduate 📝 In February, Hua Ding and Nengyin Wang published a paper on acoustic metamaterial liners in Physical Review Applied 📝 In February, Kaijing Liu and Yihuan Zhu published a paper on AI-driven acoustic metamaterials in Chinese Physics Letters 📝 In January, Yu Xiao published a paper on scattering singularities in acoustic metasurfaces in Science China: Physics, Mechanics & Astronomy 📝 In January, Yujie Cheng and Hua Ding published a paper on lightweight acoustic metaliners in Journal of Materials Chemistry A 🪪 In January, Prof. Yong Li was named to the 2025 Elsevier “Highly Cited Chinese Researchers” list 2025 🪪 In December, Chuanhao Ge received a 2025 Tongji University Outstanding MSc Thesis Award 🔬 In December, Quansen Wang was selected for the CAST Young Scientists Development Program (PhD Track) 🔬 In December, Yihuan Zhu was selected for the CAST Young Scientists Development Program (PhD Track) 🔬 In December, Dr. Ruizhi Dong was selected for the Shanghai “Super Postdoctoral” Incentive Program 🪪 In November, Nengyin Wang received the Tongji University Outstanding Student Award 🪪 In November, Nengyin Wang received the Bronze Convergence Award at the 5th “HaiJu YingCai” Global Innovation & Entrepreneurship Competition 🪪 In November, Yihuan Zhu received the Tongji University Outstanding PhD Student Scholarship 🪪 In November, Prof. Yong Li joined the Editorial Advisory Board of APS Open Science 🪪 In November, Dr. Sibo Huang was named to a National Young Talent Program 🔬 In November, Dr. Zhiling Zhou received the Hong Kong RGC Junior Research Fellow Award 💼 In October, Dr. Sibo Huang was appointed Associate Professor at Shanghai Jiao Tong University 🪪 In October, Nengyin Wang received the National PhD Scholarship 🪪 In October, Quansen Wang received the National PhD Scholarship 🪪 In October, Chun Liu received the National MSc Scholarship 📝 In September, Dr. Jingyi Chen and Dr. Zhiling Zhou published a paper on hybrid degeneracy points in Physical Review Letters 🪪 In September, Prof. Yong Li was listed among the World’s Top 2% Scientists (Career Impact) 📝 In August, Quansen Wang and Chun Liu published a paper on asymmetric acoustic information transport in Nature Communications 🪪 In June, Chun Liu received the ORION MSc Scholarship from Université de Lorraine, France 📝 In June, Chuanhao Ge and Nengyin Wang published a paper on acoustic absorber limits in Physical Review Letters 📝 In May, Nengyin Wang, Dr. Zhiling Zhou, and Dr. Sibo Huang published a paper on ultra-broadband metamaterial absorbers in National Science Review 📝 In May, Ruizhi Dong and Yihuan Zhu published a paper on topological bound states in the continuum in Physical Review Letters 🪪 In May, Nengyin Wang received a Tongji University “Pursuit of Excellence” Student Award nomination 2024 🔬 In December, Prof. Yong Li was named to the Shanghai “Oriental Talent” Leading Program 🔬 In December, Dr. Chen Shao was selected for the Shanghai “Super Postdoctoral” Incentive Program 🪪 In December, Nengyin Wang was recognized as a Tongji University Academic Pioneer Graduate Student 🔬 In December, Quansen Wang received an NSFC Basic Research Grant for PhD Students 🪪 In November, Dr. Sibo Huang was named to a National Young Talent Program 🪪 In November, Quansen Wang received an ASA CIRE Grant (Acoustical Society of America) 🔬 In November, Dr. Chen Shao received a China Postdoctoral Science Foundation Grant 🪪 In October, Prof. Yong Li was recognized as an Outstanding Innovation and Entrepreneurship Mentor at the China International College Students Innovation Competition 🏆 In October, Nengyin Wang and team won the National Gold Medal at the China International College Students Innovation Competition 🏆 In October, Nengyin Wang and team won the Shanghai Regional Gold Award and Runner-up Prize at the same competition 🔬 In August, Dr. Chen Shao received the NSFC Young Scientists Fund 🔬 In August, Dr. Chao Song received the NSFC Young Scientists Fund 🪪 In May, Dr. Zhiling Zhou was named a Shanghai Outstanding Graduate 🪪 In March, Dr. Zhiling Zhou received a Tongji University Outstanding PhD Dissertation Award 2023 📝 In October, our review of acoustic metasurfaces was published in Reports on Progress in Physics 📝 In March, Zhiling Zhou and Bin Jia published a paper on chiral metasurfaces in Physical Review Letters 📝 In March, Nengyin Wang and Dr. Sibo Huang published a paper on metamaterial silencers in International Journal of Extreme Manufacturing

pages.title: 📢 大事件
pages.text: 2026年 📝 6月 宋潮博士关于高鲁棒法布里-珀罗连续域束缚态的论文发表于Physical Review B as Letter 🪪 4月 王能银博士获上海市优秀毕业生称号 📝 2月 丁华和王能银关于切向流下宽带超构声衬的研究成果发表于Physical Review Applied 📝 2月 刘开静和朱一寰关于AI驱动声学超构材料的论文发表于Chinese Physics Letters 📝 1月 肖钰关于声学超表面散射奇异点的论文发表于Science China: Physics, Mechanics and Astronomy - 文章简介 📝 1月 程榆傑和丁华关于轻质宽带超构声衬的论文发表于Journal of Materials Chemistry A 🪪 1月 李勇教授入选2025爱思唯尔“中国高被引学者”榜单 2025年 🪪 12月 葛传昊的学位论文入选同济大学2025年优秀硕士学位论文 🔬 12月 王泉森入选中国科协青年科技人才培育工程博士生专项计划 🔬 12月 朱一寰入选中国科协青年科技人才培育工程博士生专项计划 🔬 12月 董睿智博士入选上海市“超级博士后” 🪪 11月 黄思博博士入选国家级青年人才项目 🪪 11月 王能银获同济大学优秀学生标兵 🪪 11月 王能银获第五届“海聚英才”全球创新创业大赛铜聚奖 🪪 11月 朱一寰获同济大学优秀博士生奖学金 🪪 11月 李勇教授加入APS Open Science期刊Editorial Advisory Board 🔬 11月 周志凌博士获中国香港政府 RGC Junior Research Fellow Award 💼 10月 黄思博博士获聘上海交通大学副教授 🪪 10月 王能银获博士生国家奖学金 🪪 10月 王泉森获博士生国家奖学金 🪪 10月 刘春获硕士生国家奖学金 📝 09月 陈静怡和周志凌博士关于混合简并点的论文发表于物理评论快报 🪪 09月 李勇教授入选全球前2%顶尖科学家（生涯影响力） 📝 08月 王泉森和刘春关于非对称声信息传输的论文发表于自然·通讯 🪪 06月 刘春获法国洛林大学ORION硕士奖学金 📝 06月 葛传昊和王能银关于吸声结构因果律的研究成果发表于物理评论快报 📝 05月 王能银和周志凌/黄思博博士关于超宽频超构吸声体的研究成果发表于国家科学评论 📝 05月 董睿智和朱一寰关于连续谱中拓扑束缚态的研究成果发表于物理评论快报 🪪 05月 王能银获同济大学追求卓越学生提名奖 2024年 🔬 12月 李勇教授获批上海市东方英才领军项目 🔬 12月 邵晨博士入选上海市“超级博士后”资助 🪪 12月 王能银入选同济大学第十八届研究生学术先锋 🔬 12月 王泉森获批基金委基础研究专项博士生项目 🪪 11月 王泉森获美国声学学会CIRE学生奖 🔬 11月 邵晨获批中国博士后基金面上项目 🪪 10月 李勇教授获中国国际大学生创新大赛优秀创新创业导师 🏆 10月 王能银等获中国国际大学生创新大赛全国金奖 🏆 10月 王能银等获中国国际大学生创新大赛上海赛区亚军/金奖 🔬 8月 邵晨博士获批国自然青年基金项目 🔬 8月 宋潮博士获批国自然青年基金项目 🪪 5月 周志凌博士获上海市优秀毕业生称号 🪪 3月 周志凌博士论文入选同济大学优秀博士学位论文 2023年 📝 10月 团队关于非局域和非厄米声学超构表面综述文章发表于物理学进展报告 📝 3月 周志凌和贾彬关于手性超构表面的科研成果发表于物理评论快报 📝 3月 王能银和黄思博博士关于超构消声器的科研成果发表于极端制造

pages.title: 📰 媒体报道
pages.text: “Hollow corkscrews may put a cork in noisy ventilation”, Chris Lee, Arstechnica “Does material matter in designing better acoustic metasurfaces?”, Raima Larter, American Institute of Physics Scilight. “Focusing Sound with Metasurfaces: A New Way to Reduce Noise and Power Devices?”, Kendra Redmond, PhysBuzz. “Absorbing acoustics with soundless spirals”, John Arnst, American Institute of Physics. “Researchers achieve near-perfect absorption of sounds waves”, Bob Yirk, Phys.org. “Physicists Achieve Perfect Acoustic Absorption”, Michael Byrne, motherboard. “Designing an Acoustic Diode”, Jason Socrates Bardi, American Institute of Physics. “Directional Acoustics Could Sharpen Ultrasound Images”, Wayt Gibbs, Scientific American.

pages.title: 📬 Join Us
pages.text: We welcome inquiries from prospective postdoctoral researchers, PhD students, and MSc students. Interested candidates are encouraged to email us with a CV, research interests, and representative achievements. Contact: yongli@tongji.edu.cn

pages.title: 📬 加入我们
pages.text: 课题组长期欢迎博士后、博士研究生和硕士研究生申请者联系。 有意者请通过邮件联系，并附个人简历、研究兴趣和代表性成果。 联系方式：yongli@tongji.edu.cn
